en-US.name: Fish Breeding: Corydoras Guide
en-US.subtitle: Spawn Trigger Water Change Log
en-US.promotional_text: Breeding Corydoras? Fish Breeding reads the barometric trend and your cool-change setup, then tells you when to trigger a spawn.
en-US.description:
Should you trigger a spawn tonight? Fish Breeding turns your barometric trend, cool-water-change setup, conditioning days, and each female's recovery into one clear verdict for Corydoras and other rain-triggered fish.

Every Corydoras breeder knows the drill: a large cool-water change timed to a falling barometer imitates the rainy season and triggers a spawn. But is tonight the moment? It depends on the pressure trend, how much colder your change water really is, how long the females have been conditioned, and how long since they last spawned. Guess wrong and you waste a conditioning cycle, over-tire a female, or risk a temperature drop that's too sharp.

HOW IT WORKS

1. Add a group: species, tank temperature, change-water temperature, female condition, and start conditioning.
2. Fish Breeding reads the barometric trend right from your device and checks your cool-change feasibility.
3. You get one verdict — PRIME, PREP, CONDITION, RECOVER, or HOLD — with the reason and the exact action.

Under a minute to set up. No account required.

CORE FEATURES

Today's Verdict
A single answer plus the why — pressure trend, cool-change target, conditioning day, and recovery day, read at a glance instead of tracked on paper or in a spreadsheet.

On-Device Pressure
Reads barometric pressure and its trend right on your device, so you can see a front moving in even offline.

Cool-Change Guidance
Exact change percentage and target temperature drop for your species, with a safety warning when the drop is large enough to stress fish or crack glass.

PRO FEATURES
Upgrade to Pro for deeper insights:
- Unlimited breeding groups across your fish room
- 48-72 hour barometric pressure forecast with front timing
- Trigger-window alerts so you never miss a front
- Conditioning and recovery timers with reminders
- Per-group spawn history with photos and notes
- All species profiles plus a custom profile builder

PRIVACY FIRST
- No account, no login
- All data stored locally on your device
- Location is used only for the optional pressure forecast. Coordinates are never stored on any server.
- No tracking, no ads, no third-party analytics

Fish Breeding: Corydoras Guide is an informational timing tool based on general fishkeeping references. It is not a medical or veterinary tool, does not assess an animal's health, and is not a substitute for guidance from an experienced aquarist or veterinarian.
